basic_details.job_title: MGNREGA South Andaman Gram Rozgar Sevak Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: MGNREGA South Andaman Recruitment 2026: MGNREGA South Andaman has released the official notification for 4 Gram Rozgar Sevak posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: XII Pass, Diploma/certificate (6 Months or more) in computer applications from a recognized Institute
qualification.details: Gram Rozgar Sevak: XIIth Pass. Diploma/certificate (6 Months or more duration Course) in computer applications from a recognized Institute. Desirable: At least 1 Year experience in the relevant field. Graduate with Computer knowledge.

salary_details.details: Gram Rozgar Sevak: Rs 14000/- With EPF @13 %

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MGNREGA South Andaman Gram Rozgar Sevak Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: andamannicobar.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MGNREGA South Andaman Gram Rozgar Sevak Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MGNREGA South Andaman Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download MGNREGA South Andaman Gram Rozgar Sevak Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Gram Rozgar Sevak: XIIth Pass. Diploma/certificate (6 Months or more duration Course) in computer applications from a recognized Institute. Desirable: At least 1 Year experience in the relevant field. Graduate with Computer knowledge.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 40 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Gram Rozgar Sevak: Rs 14000/- With EPF @13 %

rows.event: Last Date of receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MGNREGA South Andaman Gram Rozgar Sevak Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: andamannicobar.gov.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MGNREGA South Andaman Gram Rozgar Sevak Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MGNREGA South Andaman Gram Rozgar Sevak Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for Gram Rozgar Sevak posts is 14 July 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications reach the specified address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in MGNREGA South Andaman Gram Rozgar Sevak Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Gram Rozgar Sevak post under the MGNREGA South Andaman Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for MGNREGA South Andaman Gram Rozgar Sevak posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Gram Rozgar Sevak posts is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it by post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Gram Rozgar Sevak posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Gram Rozgar Sevak post is 40 years. Please refer to the official notification for any age relaxation details.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Gram Rozgar Sevak in MGNREGA South Andaman?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Gram Rozgar Sevak post will receive a salary of Rs. 14000 per month, along with EPF @13 %.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for Gram Rozgar Sevak?
faq.answer: Candidates must be XII Pass and possess a Diploma/certificate (6 Months or more) in computer applications from a recognized Institute.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for MGNREGA South Andaman Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the MGNREGA South Andaman Gram Rozgar Sevak Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Gram Rozgar Sevak posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for Gram Rozgar Sevak posts primarily involves Document Verification. Further details can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the official website of MGNREGA South Andaman. A direct link is usually provided in the important links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for Gram Rozgar Sevak posts?
faq.answer: The Gram Rozgar Sevak posts under MGNREGA South Andaman are on a Contract basis.
